CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:BlockedNumbersScreen.kt$(onClick = { viewModel.add(newNumber); showDialog = false; newNumber = "" }, enabled = newNumber.isNotBlank())
ArgumentListWrapping:BlockedNumbersScreen.kt$(value = newNumber, onValueChange = { newNumber = it }, singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
ArgumentListWrapping:MainApplication.kt$MainApplication$( "MonotonicDriftRecovery: post-reboot realign (safety=%s, emergency=%s, nowMono=%d)", safetyDrift, emergencyDrift, nowMono, )
ArgumentListWrapping:MediaAttachmentBubble.kt$(onCopy = onCopy, onForward = onForward, onReply = onReply, onReact = onReact, onDelete = onDelete)
ArgumentListWrapping:MmsDownloader.kt$MmsDownloader$( context, reqCode, intent, PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE, )
ArgumentListWrapping:MmsSender.kt$MmsSender$("dispatchMms: deleting previous system row %d before retry of local=%d", previous, localMessageId)
ArgumentListWrapping:MmsSender.kt$MmsSender$(persisted.exceptionOrNull(), "dispatchMms: setMmsSystemId(%d, %d) failed — rolling back", localMessageId, mmsSystemId)
ArgumentListWrapping:MmsSystemWriteback.kt$MmsSystemWriteback$("MmsSystemWriteback: inserted outbox row id=%d (%d recipient(s), %d attachment(s))", mmsId, recipients.size, attachments.size)
ArgumentListWrapping:TelephonyReader.kt$TelephonyReader$( "TelephonyReader: MMS %d skipped (empty address after FROM=137/151/129 fallback, direction=%d, threadId=%d)", mmsId, direction, threadId, )
ArgumentListWrapping:TelephonySyncManager.kt$TelephonySyncManager$("runSync(%s) blocked sources: room=%d system=%d → suffixes=%d", reason, roomBlocked.size, systemBlocked.size, blockedSuffixes.size)
ArgumentListWrapping:TelephonySyncManager.kt$TelephonySyncManager$("runSync(%s) done; imported=%d skipped(blocked)=%d cursor=%d→%d", reason, imported, skipped, current, newCursor)
ArgumentListWrapping:TelephonySyncManager.kt$TelephonySyncManager$("runSync(%s) imported %d MMS rows (firstRun=%b hasAnyMms=%b)", reason, imported, isFirstRun, hasAnyMms)

ArgumentListWrapping:TelephonySyncWorker.kt$TelephonySyncWorker$( "Auto-purge: %d messages older than %d days (safety net %d d, next in %d d)", purged, days, SAFETY_NET_DAYS, AUTO_PURGE_INTERVAL_MS / MS_PER_DAY, )
ArgumentListWrapping:TelephonySyncWorker.kt$TelephonySyncWorker$("Auto-purge: first run, anchor set; first purge in %d days", AUTO_PURGE_INTERVAL_MS / MS_PER_DAY)
ArgumentListWrapping:ThreadViewModel.kt$ThreadViewModel$("dispatchReactionSms: dedup re-send on %d within %ds", messageId, REACTION_DEDUP_WINDOW_MS / 1000)

CyclomaticComplexMethod:AudioMessageBubble.kt$@Composable fun AudioMessageBubble( message: Message, audio: Attachment, /** * Audit P-P1-2: the playback state is passed as a **lambda** rather than the raw * `PlaybackState` value, so the playback controller's 5 Hz progress ticks (see * [VoicePlaybackController.TICK_MS]) only recompose the bubble that is actually * active. Without this indirection, every tick invalidated every audio bubble in * the thread — a 500-message thread with one playing clip was burning ~2.5 k * recompositions/s. * * The lambda is wrapped in `derivedStateOf` below and the value field that drives * the slider (`positionMs`) is only re-read while the slider is mounted in the * active bubble's composition. */ playbackProvider: () -> VoicePlaybackController.PlaybackState, onTogglePlay: () -> Unit, onSeekTo: (Int) -> Unit, onDelete: () -> Unit = {}, onReply: (() -> Unit)? = null, onReact: (() -> Unit)? = null, /** * v1.3.11 (F5) — forward the voice clip + sender label to another conversation. No * `onCopy` here: a voice MMS has no text payload to copy. */ onForward: (() -> Unit)? = null, onRemoveReaction: () -> Unit = {}, repliedToPreview: ReplyQuotePreview? = null, showTimestamp: Boolean = false, /** v1.3.3 #7 — étiquette d'expéditeur ; voir [MessageBubble] pour la sémantique. */ senderLabel: String? = null, )

CyclomaticComplexMethod:SettingsScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun SettingsScreen( onBack: () -> Unit, onOpenAbout: () -> Unit, onOpenBackup: () -> Unit, onOpenMigration: () -> Unit, onOpenBlocked: () -> Unit, onOpenSafetyCall: () -> Unit, onOpenEmergency: () -> Unit, onOpenEmergencySetup: () -> Unit, // v1.15.1 — Accès à la nouvelle screen "Messages programmés" (infra existait // déjà mais aucune UI ne l'exposait — feature dormante). onOpenScheduledMessages: () -> Unit, viewModel: SettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel(), )

CyclomaticComplexMethod:ThreadScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun ThreadScreen( conversationId: Long, onBack: () -> Unit, /** * v1.3.11 (F5) — navigation hook fired when the user picks an existing target * conversation in the forward sheet. The caller (`AppRoot`) typically does * `popBackStack(); navigate(Thread(id))` so the user returns to the conversation list * after the forwarded message is sent rather than stacking thread on top of thread. */ onForwardToConversation: (Long) -> Unit = {}, /** * v1.3.11 (F5) — navigation hook fired when the user picks "Nouveau destinataire" * in the forward sheet. The caller routes to [com.filestech.sms.ui.screens.compose * .ComposeScreen] which then funnels back into a thread once a contact is picked. */ onForwardToNewContact: () -> Unit = {}, viewModel: ThreadViewModel = hiltViewModel(), )

LongMethod:ConversationsScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun ConversationsScreen( archived: Boolean = false, onOpenThread: (Long) -> Unit, onCompose: () -> Unit, onOpenSettings: () -> Unit, onOpenVault: () -> Unit, onOpenArchived: () -> Unit, onOpenBlocked: () -> Unit, onOpenAbout: () -> Unit = {}, onBack: (() -> Unit)? = null, viewModel: ConversationsViewModel = hiltViewModel(), )

LongMethod:SettingsScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun SettingsScreen( onBack: () -> Unit, onOpenAbout: () -> Unit, onOpenBackup: () -> Unit, onOpenMigration: () -> Unit, onOpenBlocked: () -> Unit, onOpenSafetyCall: () -> Unit, onOpenEmergency: () -> Unit, onOpenEmergencySetup: () -> Unit, // v1.15.1 — Accès à la nouvelle screen "Messages programmés" (infra existait // déjà mais aucune UI ne l'exposait — feature dormante). onOpenScheduledMessages: () -> Unit, viewModel: SettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel(), )

LongMethod:ThreadScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun ThreadScreen( conversationId: Long, onBack: () -> Unit, /** * v1.3.11 (F5) — navigation hook fired when the user picks an existing target * conversation in the forward sheet. The caller (`AppRoot`) typically does * `popBackStack(); navigate(Thread(id))` so the user returns to the conversation list * after the forwarded message is sent rather than stacking thread on top of thread. */ onForwardToConversation: (Long) -> Unit = {}, /** * v1.3.11 (F5) — navigation hook fired when the user picks "Nouveau destinataire" * in the forward sheet. The caller routes to [com.filestech.sms.ui.screens.compose * .ComposeScreen] which then funnels back into a thread once a contact is picked. */ onForwardToNewContact: () -> Unit = {}, viewModel: ThreadViewModel = hiltViewModel(), )

LongParameterList:ThreadViewModel.kt$ThreadViewModel$( savedStateHandle: SavedStateHandle, private val repo: ConversationRepository, private val sendSms: SendSmsUseCase, private val sendVoiceMms: SendVoiceMmsUseCase, private val sendMediaMms: SendMediaMmsUseCase, private val retrySend: RetrySendUseCase, private val markRead: MarkConversationReadUseCase, private val segCounter: SmsSegmentCounter, private val exportPdf: ExportConversationPdfUseCase, private val voiceRecorder: VoiceRecorder, private val playbackController: VoicePlaybackController, private val settings: SettingsRepository, private val blockNumber: com.filestech.sms.domain.usecase.BlockNumberUseCase, private val toggleConvState: com.filestech.sms.domain.usecase.ToggleConversationStateUseCase, private val contactRepo: com.filestech.sms.domain.repository.ContactRepository, private val sendReaction: SendReactionUseCase, // v1.15.1 — Schedule a SMS for later via WorkManager (infra existait avant, UI nouvelle). private val scheduleMessage: com.filestech.sms.domain.usecase.ScheduleMessageUseCase, private val incomingShare: com.filestech.sms.system.share.IncomingShareHolder, private val activeConversationTracker: ActiveConversationTracker, @ApplicationContext private val context: android.content.Context, @com.filestech.sms.di.IoDispatcher private val io: kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher, // v1.12.0 — overflow "Déplacer vers le coffre" : on a besoin du flag // PanicDecoy pour gater l'item (cohérence avec masquage liste + // Settings + filtre nav AppRoot). En decoy, l'item NE DOIT PAS // apparaître (l'agresseur ne doit pas savoir qu'un coffre existe). private val appLock: com.filestech.sms.security.AppLockManager, )
MaxLineLength:BlockedNumbersScreen.kt$OutlinedTextField(value = newNumber, onValueChange = { newNumber = it }, singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())

MaxLineLength:ConversationPdfExporter.kt$ConversationPdfExporter$val incomingStroke = Paint().apply { color = Color.parseColor("#CFCFCF"); isAntiAlias = true; style = Paint.Style.STROKE; strokeWidth = 0.75f }
MaxLineLength:KeepAliveService.kt$KeepAliveService$"KeepAliveService.startForeground failed — likely POST_NOTIFICATIONS revoked or background restriction. Service will not stay alive."
MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt$MainActivity$"MainActivity: requesting %d missing critical permissions at cold-start (likely Samsung One UI Android 10 GRANTED_BY_ROLE bug)"
MaxLineLength:MainApplication.kt$MainApplication$"MainApplication: repairing dirty emergency state (enabled=%s shortcut=%s police=%s lastTriggeredAt=%d) → cascade-disable"
MaxLineLength:MmsSender.kt$MmsSender$Timber.w(persisted.exceptionOrNull(), "dispatchMms: setMmsSystemId(%d, %d) failed — rolling back", localMessageId, mmsSystemId)
MaxLineLength:MmsSystemWriteback.kt$MmsSystemWriteback$Timber.i("MmsSystemWriteback: inserted outbox row id=%d (%d recipient(s), %d attachment(s))", mmsId, recipients.size, attachments.size)
MaxLineLength:TelephonySyncManager.kt$TelephonySyncManager$Timber.i("runSync(%s) blocked sources: room=%d system=%d → suffixes=%d", reason, roomBlocked.size, systemBlocked.size, blockedSuffixes.size)
MultiLineIfElse:AudioMessageBubble.kt$LocalPlayback.Active( isPlaying = st.isPlaying, positionMs = st.positionMs, durationMs = st.durationMs, )

MultiLineIfElse:SettingsScreen.kt$SectionCard( title = stringResource(R.string.settings_section_safety_call), icon = Icons.Outlined.Shield, ) { val safetyCall = state.security.safetyCall if (safetyCall.enabled) { // Récap visible quand armé : durée, restant, contacts, // template + 2 actions (Modifier / Je vais bien). SafetyCallArmedRecap( config = safetyCall, remainingMs = safetyCallRemainingMs, onModify = onOpenSafetyCall, onImOk = { viewModel.update { s -> s.copy( security = s.security.copy( safetyCall = s.security.safetyCall.copy( lastActivityAt = System.currentTimeMillis(), // v1.10.0 SEC-11 — couple mono+wall. monotonicLastActivityAt = SystemClock.elapsedRealtime(), ), ), ) } rootScope.launch { snackbarHost.showSnackbar( ctx.getString(R.string.settings_safety_call_im_ok_snack), ) } }, ) } else { NavigationRow( title = stringResource(R.string.settings_safety_call_title), description = stringResource(R.string.settings_safety_call_disabled) + "\n" + stringResource(R.string.settings_safety_call_desc), onClick = onOpenSafetyCall, ) } }
ReturnCount:LocationResolver.kt$LocationResolver$suspend fun getCurrentLocation( timeoutMs: Long = DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS, ): Location?

ReturnCount:MmsBuilder.kt$MmsBuilder$fun buildMultipartSendReq( attachments: List<MmsAttachment>, textBody: String?, recipients: List<String>, subject: String? = null, requestDeliveryReport: Boolean = false, ): ByteArray?
ReturnCount:MmsDownloader.kt$MmsDownloader$fun download( contentLocation: String, transactionId: String?, senderAddress: String?, subId: Int? = null, ): Outcome<Unit>
ReturnCount:SmishingDetector.kt$SmishingDetector$internal fun levenshteinAtMost(a: String, b: String, maxDistance: Int): Boolean
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AppDatabase.kt$AppDatabase.Companion$// v2 (2026-05-15): adds `messages.reply_to_message_id` + matching index for the
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AppLockManager.kt$AppLockManager.LockState.Locked$/** Lock is configured ON and user has not unlocked yet. UI must be hidden. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AppLockManager.kt$AppLockManager.LockState.LockedOut$/** Too many failed attempts — UI shows the countdown, no PIN accepted yet. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AppLockManager.kt$AppLockManager.LockState.PanicDecoy$/** Panic-code unlock — UI is visible but the vault must remain hidden. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BackupScreen.kt$BackupViewModel.Event.RestoreDone$// v1.15.2 — Événements restore. Le succès porte le récap chiffré pour l'affichage,
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BackupService.kt$BackupService.Companion$// Audit SECU-M1 v1.15.2 — Caps dur sur le nombre d'objets désérialisés du JSON.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BackupService.kt$BackupService.Companion$// v1.15.2 — Cap de sécurité sur la taille d'un .smsbk à restaurer. 50 MB couvre des
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BackupService.kt$BackupService.Companion$// v1.17.0 audit KOTLIN-L2 — Bornes header `.smsbk` alignées sur les constantes
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ConversationsViewModel.kt$ConversationsViewModel.Event.IAmOkDoneNoSms$/** v1.14.0 — Reset cooldown effectué, pas de SMS (opt-in OFF). */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ConversationsViewModel.kt$ConversationsViewModel.Event.IAmOkDoneWithSms$/** v1.14.0 — Reset cooldown + SMS "Je vais bien" envoyé. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:EmergencyCallHelper.kt$EmergencyCallHelper.CallOutcome.INVALID_NUMBER$/** Numéro non dans la whitelist. Caller bug. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:EmergencyCallHelper.kt$EmergencyCallHelper.CallOutcome.NO_DIALER$/** Aucun dialer installé (rare, stripped AOSP / corporate MDM). */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:EmergencyCallHelper.kt$EmergencyCallHelper.CallOutcome.PERMISSION_DENIED$/** CALL_PHONE non accordée alors qu'on tente placeCall. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:EmergencyShortcutNotifier.kt$EmergencyShortcutNotifier.Companion$// v1.14.1 — content-intent request code, distinct des actions DIAL.

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MmsDownloadedReceiver.kt$MmsDownloadedReceiver.Companion$/** * v1.3.10 (SEC-03/P4) — hard ceiling on the dedup set. A storm of distinct fresh * transaction-ids (carrier hiccup or hypothetical replay flood from an internal * component) would otherwise let the map grow unbounded for the full TTL window. * 256 entries × ~40 B ≈ 10 KiB worst case — still well under any sane budget for * 5 minutes of MMS bursts, and gives the LinkedHashMap-LRU eviction priority over * the time-based prune when both kick in. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MmsDownloadedReceiver.kt$MmsDownloadedReceiver.Companion$/** Audit M-10: TTL for the in-memory dedup set. 5 min covers real-world carrier replays. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MmsDownloadedReceiver.kt$MmsDownloadedReceiver.Companion$/** v1.14.7 — nouvelle racine persistante (filesDir) pour les attachments MMS reçus. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MmsDownloadedReceiver.kt$MmsDownloadedReceiver.MmsDownloadedEntryPoint$// Audit R2 (v1.14.8) — Notification user lorsque le download MMS échoue (rc != OK).
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MmsDownloader.kt$MmsDownloader.Companion$/** v1.22.0 — SIM d'arrivée du MMS, propagée du WAP push jusqu'au write-back Room. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MmsWapPushReceiver.kt$MmsWapPushReceiver.MmsWapPushEntryPoint$// Audit R1 (v1.14.8) — notification user lorsque le MMS dépasse le cap auto-download.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:NotificationChannelInitializer.kt$NotificationChannelInitializer.Companion$/** v1.12.0 — canal pour le raccourci d'urgence (action URGENCE + action 112). */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:NotificationChannelInitializer.kt$NotificationChannelInitializer.Companion$/** v1.9.0 — canal dédié au warning Safety Call (avant trigger). */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:Routes.kt$Splash$// v1.23.2 — route `Onboarding` retirée : injoignable depuis v1.2.0 (aucun
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SecurityStore.kt$SecurityStore.K$// v1.14.8 R7 — anti-wallclock-manipulation : baseline mono + durée d'origine.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// Bumped from a boolean ("didInitialSmsImport") to a long cursor: the latter encodes the
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.10.0 SEC-11 — snapshot monotonic du dernier reset, anti clock-forward.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.10.0 audit S2 — snapshot monotonic du dernier trigger urgence.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.10.0 — Mode urgence (réutilise les contacts Safety call).
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.12.0 — bouton Appeler Police 17 (FR uniquement, opt-in).
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.14.0 — SMS "Je vais bien" sur kill-switch.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.14.7 — flag one-shot pour la migration des attachments MMS cacheDir → filesDir.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.21.0 — indicatif pays par défaut pour la conversion E.164 des numéros
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.22.x — flag de complétion de la dédup des conversations du même numéro.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.8.0 (bug 5 fix) — nouveau format avec 3 valeurs (READABLE_FR / TAPBACK_EN
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.8.0 — flag one-shot pour la migration de purge des badges hérités v1.7.1.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsRepository.kt$SettingsRepository.K$// v1.8.1 — override personnel du nom inclus dans les SMS de réaction
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsViewModel.kt$SettingsViewModel.Event.HistoryPurged$/** v1.3.0 — résultat du nettoyage manuel de l'historique (bouton "Effacer maintenant"). */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SettingsViewModel.kt$SettingsViewModel.Event.ResyncRequested$/** v1.3.0 — re-sync from content://sms a été enquêtée. Le snack confirme à l'utilisateur. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ThreadViewModel.kt$ThreadViewModel.Companion$// Audit C3 (v1.14.8) — Alias local pointant vers la SOURCE UNIQUE [MmsConstants].
Wrapping:ConversationPdfExporter.kt$ConversationPdfExporter$color = Color.parseColor("#CFCFCF"); isAntiAlias = true; style = Paint.Style.STROKE; strokeWidth = 0.75f
Wrapping:SimLabeler.kt${ subId: Int? -> if (subId == null) null else labels[subId] }

Wrapping:VaultScreen.kt${ onError -> val authenticators = androidx.biometric.BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_WEAK val activity = ctx.findVaultActivity() if (activity == null) { onError() } else { val executor = androidx.core.content.ContextCompat.getMainExecutor(activity) val prompt = androidx.biometric.BiometricPrompt( activity, executor, object : androidx.biometric.BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationCallback() { override fun onAuthenticationSucceeded( result: androidx.biometric.BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationResult, ) { vaultPinPassed = true viewModel.markUnlocked() unlocked = true } override fun onAuthenticationError( errorCode: Int, errString: CharSequence, ) { onError() } }, ) val info = androidx.biometric.BiometricPrompt.PromptInfo.Builder() .setTitle(ctx.getString(R.string.vault_biometric_title)) .setSubtitle(ctx.getString(R.string.vault_biometric_subtitle)) .setNegativeButtonText(ctx.getString(R.string.action_cancel)) .setAllowedAuthenticators(authenticators) .setConfirmationRequired(false) .build() prompt.authenticate(info) } }
